title: Over Enchanted
description: A simple mod that adds more levels to vanilla enchantments.
body:
THE MOD IS CURRENTLY NOT COMPATIBLE WITH GOBLIN TRADERS.

Please ask the Goblin Traders devs to fix this, as this is not an issue on my part.

Over Enchanted is a simple mod that adds more levels to ALL enchantments!

NOW AVAILABLE FOR FORGE AND FABRIC

You need to use an Anvil to get levels over normal level.

(Example: Sharpness V + Sharpness V = Sharpness VI)

THIS MOD CAN BE A BIT OVERPOWERED.

If you are looking for a challenging gameplay, then this might not be useful.

FOR BUGS COMMENT BELOW OR OPEN A GITHUB ISSUE
